findings.issue: Zip-file forging enables cross-instance impersonation via fake CEO-relayed prompts
findings.recommended_fix: Implement digital signatures + content-hash verification for all cross-instance handoffs

findings.issue: Courier loop risks inconsistent shame-free language enforcement across instances
findings.recommended_fix: Centralize prompt sanitization before dispatch to all instances
Log all courier exchanges to zeus.governance_events with content-hash + timestamp + source-instance metadata
